name: Thanulux Public Company Limited
summary: Thanulux Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes finished garments and leather products for men, women and children in Thailand. It offers shirts, T-shirts, trousers, jeans, suits, jackets, pajamas, underwear, neckties, socks, maternity wear, swimsuits, and sportswear, as well as leather goods comprising wallets, handbags, and belts. The company also provides garments for infants to 8 year-olds; and diapers, bedding, shoes, socks, dolls, and accessories for toddlers. In addition, the company manufactures and exports various other products; and manufactures uniforms, Buddhist monk triple robes, and white robes for practice of dharma under the Thammarat and Thammasorn brand, as well as green living products under the SRIDA brand. Thanulux Public Company Limited exports its products to Europe, Asia, the United States, Australia, and South Africa. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
